job_description:
• We are looking for experienced SoC performance engineers who are passionate about enhancing system performance on Arm IPs.
• With a mid-year, and year-end review you'll have two windows each year to progress recognizing the pace at which you could grow.
• Join our Graduate Committee and home in on your planning, networking and co-ordination skills.
• Hold (or are on track to hold) a University degree or equivalent experience by the programme start date.
• Candidates with alternative degrees will also be considered if they have meaningful experience.
• A yearly occurrence exclusive for Graduates allowing you to hear from executive members, inspiring speakers and make connections for life.
• You will apply your performance analysis skills in modeling and evaluating new features for future IPs, and will play a key role in productizing performance models for partners in the Arm ecosystem.
• Work closely with internal and external teams, delivering the collateral needed to develop the highest performing systems based on Arm technology.
